---
title: "Ports of animation examples - animint2 Gallery"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: false
    css: style.css
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, results="asis", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE)

#loading data
meta       <- tryCatch(read.csv("meta.csv", stringsAsFactors=FALSE), error=function(e) data.frame())
error_meta <- tryCatch(read.csv("error.csv", stringsAsFactors=FALSE), error=function(e) data.frame())

# Create a clean owner/repo helper function
get_urls <- function(owner_repo) {
  parts <- strsplit(owner_repo, "/")[[1]]
  owner <- parts[1]
  repo  <- parts[2]
  list(
    viz = paste0("https://", owner, ".github.io/", repo, "/"),
    repo = paste0("[https://github.com/](https://github.com/)", owner_repo),
    img = paste0("[https://raw.githubusercontent.com/](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/)", owner_repo, "/gh-pages/Capture.PNG")
  )
}
```

<div class="hero">
<div class="hero-inner">
<p class="hero-eyebrow">GSoC 2026 · animint2</p>
<h1>Ports of animation examples</h1>
<p class="hero-sub">Interactive statistical visualizations ported to animint2</p>
<div class="hero-links">
<a href="https://github.com/tdhock/animint/wiki/Ports-of-animation-examples" class="hero-btn">Wiki page</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

```{r stats}
total <- nrow(meta)
missing <- if(nrow(error_meta) > 0) nrow(error_meta) else 0
cat(paste0(
  "<div class='stats-row'>",
  "<div class='stat-box'><p class='stat-number'>", total, "</p><p class='stat-label'>visualizations</p></div>",
  "<div class='stat-box'><p class='stat-number'>", total + missing, "</p><p class='stat-label'>total ports</p></div>",
  "</div>"
))

if(nrow(meta) > 0) {
  # Matching your specific CSV column: viz_owner_repo
  yours <- meta[grepl("Nishita-shah1", meta$viz_owner_repo, ignore.case=TRUE), ]
  
  if(nrow(yours) > 0) {
    cat("<p class='section-label'>your contribution</p>")
    cat("<div class='grid'>")
    for(i in seq_len(nrow(yours))) {
      r <- yours[i, ]
      urls <- get_urls(r$viz_owner_repo)
      
      cat(paste0(
        "<div class='card yours'>",
        "<div class='card-thumb'>",
        "<img src='", urls$img, "' onerror='this.parentNode.innerHTML=\"<span class=no-img>no screenshot</span>\"'>",
        "</div>",
        "<div class='card-body'>",
        "<span class='yours-badge'>your port</span>",
        "<p class='card-title'>", r$title, "</p>",
        "<p class='card-author'>Nishita Shah</p>",
        "<div class='card-links'>",
        "<a href='", urls$viz, "' class='card-link card-link-demo'>demo</a>",
        "<a href='", r$source, "' class='card-link'>source</a>",
        "<a href='", urls$repo, "' class='card-link'>repo</a>",
        "</div></div></div>"
      ))
    }
    cat("</div>")
  }
}

if(nrow(meta) > 0) {
  others <- meta[!grepl("Nishita-shah1", meta$viz_owner_repo, ignore.case=TRUE), ]
  
  if(nrow(others) > 0) {
    cat("<p class='section-label'>all ports</p>")
    cat("<div class='grid'>")
    for(i in seq_len(nrow(others))) {
      r <- others[i, ]
      urls <- get_urls(r$viz_owner_repo)
      owner_name <- sub("/.*", "", r$viz_owner_repo)
      
      cat(paste0(
        "<div class='card'>",
        "<div class='card-thumb'>",
        "<img src='", urls$img, "' onerror='this.parentNode.innerHTML=\"<span class=no-img>no screenshot</span>\"'>",
        "</div>",
        "<div class='card-body'>",
        "<p class='card-title'>", r$title, "</p>",
        "<p class='card-author'>", owner_name, "</p>",
        "<div class='card-links'>",
        "<a href='", urls$viz, "' class='card-link card-link-demo'>demo</a>",
        "<a href='", r$source, "' class='card-link'>source</a>",
        "<a href='", urls$repo, "' class='card-link'>repo</a>",
        "</div></div></div>"
      ))
    }
    cat("</div>")
  }
}
```

<div class="footer">
Built with <a href="https://github.com/animint/animint2">animint2</a>
</div>
